title: Authors and Citation
text: Dai (2026). NestedWGCNA: Computation-First Two-Stage Gene Co-Expression Analysis. R package version 1.00, https://github.com/dai540/NestedWGCNA.
code: @Manual{,   title = {NestedWGCNA: Computation-First Two-Stage Gene Co-Expression Analysis},   author = {{Dai}},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 1.00},   url = {https://github.com/dai540/NestedWGCNA}, }

title: NestedWGCNA
text: NestedWGCNA computation-first R package two-stage gene co-expression analysis. release intentionally minimal: focuses network construction, module discovery, nested decomposition . Website: https://dai540.github.io/NestedWGCNA/

title: NestedWGCNA
text: Focus computation. visualization helpers package API. bundled case-study pipelines tutorial data.

title: NestedWGCNA
text: compute_adjacency() compute_dissimilarity() run_gene_umap() run_gene_hdbscan() core_decompose_weighted() erode_to_core() find_cgm() genfocus_normalize() find_fgm() run_nested_wgcna() module_score()

title: NestedWGCNA
code: library(NestedWGCNA)  set.seed(42) x <- matrix(   abs(rnorm(80 * 400)),   nrow = 80,   ncol = 400,   dimnames = list(paste0("S", 1:80), paste0("G", 1:400)) )  res <- run_nested_wgcna(   x = x,   mode = "paper",   min_cgm_size = 30,   min_fgm_size = 10,   top_n_genes = 300,   seed = 42 )  summary(res)

title: NestedWGCNA
text: mode = "paper": adjacency r^2, dissimilarity sqrt(1 - r^2) mode = "python_compat": adjacency |r|, dissimilarity sqrt(1 - |r|)

Coerce input to numeric expression matrix — as_expression_matrix
text: x Matrix-like object (matrix data.frame) rows samples columns genes. require_names TRUE, requires row column names.

Bootstrap-style filter (Python bootstrap_filter equivalent) — bootstrap_filter
text: Keeps genes classification error larger threshold.

title: Bootstrap-style filter (Python bootstrap_filter equivalent) — bootstrap_filter
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). threshold Threshold (default 1 / exp(1)).

Basic cleaning (Python clear_data equivalent) — clear_data
text: x Numeric expression matrix (samples x genes). fillna NULL, drop genes containing NA; otherwise fill NA value.

title: Compute adjacency matrix — compute_adjacency
code: compute_adjacency(   x,   method = c("pearson", "spearman"),   mode = c("paper", "python_compat", "custom"),   signed = FALSE,   power = NULL )

title: Compute adjacency matrix — compute_adjacency
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). method Correlation method ("pearson" "spearman"). mode Similarity mode: "paper", "python_compat", "custom". signed Whether use signed adjacency. power Optional power parameter. NULL, defaults mode.

title: Compute dissimilarity matrix — compute_dissimilarity
code: compute_dissimilarity(   adjacency,   method = c("paper_metric", "python_compat", "tom", "mot", "custom"),   custom_fun = NULL )

title: Compute dissimilarity matrix — compute_dissimilarity
text: adjacency Adjacency matrix. method One "paper_metric", "python_compat", "tom", "mot", "custom". custom_fun Optional function custom dissimilarity.

text: clusters Integer cluster labels (-1 noise). dissimilarity Gene-gene dissimilarity matrix.

title: Erode clusters to core genes — erode_to_core
Discover coarse-grained modules (CGMs) — find_cgm
code: find_cgm(   x,   mode = c("paper", "python_compat"),   corr_method = c("pearson", "spearman"),   min_cluster_size = 30,   n_components = NULL,   seed = 42 )

title: Discover coarse-grained modules (CGMs) — find_cgm
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). mode Similarity mode. corr_method Correlation method. min_cluster_size Minimum cluster size. n_components UMAP dimensions; NULL, computed Python code. seed Random seed.

title: Discover coarse-grained modules (CGMs) — find_cgm
text: List CGM assignments, core assignments, embedding, matrices.

what: Discover FGMs inside a CGM — find_fgm
title: Discover FGMs inside a CGM — find_fgm
Discover FGMs inside a CGM — find_fgm
code: find_fgm(   x,   mode = c("paper", "python_compat"),   min_cluster_size = 10,   genfocus_corr_method = c("spearman", "pearson"),   genfocus_corr_thr = 0.9,   genfocus_CVR_thr = 0.6,   seed = 42 )

title: Discover FGMs inside a CGM — find_fgm
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes) single target CGM. mode Similarity mode. min_cluster_size Minimum FGM cluster size. genfocus_corr_method Correlation method GenFocus. genfocus_corr_thr Correlation threshold INGS. genfocus_CVR_thr CVR clipping threshold. seed Random seed.

title: GenFocus normalization (R rewrite of Python reference logic) — genfocus_normalize
code: genfocus_normalize(   x,   focus = c("eigengene", "gene"),   focus_gene = NULL,   corr_method = c("spearman", "pearson"),   input_scale = c("tpm", "fpkm"),   corr_thr = 0.9,   CVR_thr = 0.6 )

title: GenFocus normalization (R rewrite of Python reference logic) — genfocus_normalize
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). focus "eigengene" "gene". focus_gene Focus gene name focus = "gene". corr_method Correlation method. input_scale "tpm" "fpkm". corr_thr Correlation threshold INGS selection. CVR_thr CVR threshold clipping.

title: GenFocus normalization (R rewrite of Python reference logic) — genfocus_normalize
text: NULL INGS established; otherwise list normalized matrix diagnostics.

title: Calculate per-sample module scores — module_score
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). assignment Integer module assignment vector genes (-1 = noise). prefix Prefix score column names.

title: Calculate per-sample module scores — module_score
text: Data frame (samples x modules) module scores.

Run NestedWGCNA end-to-end — run_nested_wgcna
code: run_nested_wgcna(   x,   mode = c("paper", "python_compat"),   min_cgm_size = 100,   min_fgm_size = 10,   corr_method = c("pearson", "spearman"),   genfocus_corr_method = c("spearman", "pearson"),   target_cgm = NULL,   top_n_genes = NULL,   seed = 42 )

title: Run NestedWGCNA end-to-end — run_nested_wgcna
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). mode Similarity mode. min_cgm_size Minimum CGM cluster size. min_fgm_size Minimum FGM cluster size. corr_method Correlation method CGM stage. genfocus_corr_method Correlation method GenFocus. target_cgm Optional target CGM id FGM stage. NULL, uses largest non-noise CGM. top_n_genes Optional variable-gene filter size. seed Random seed.

title: Select top variable genes — top_variable_genes
text: x Expression matrix (samples x genes). n Number genes keep.
